description: Unit test specifications for the Toast component, testing its constructor, methods, event handling, and jQuery interface.

classes.name: Toast
classes.description: Class representing the Toast component with methods for initialization, showing, hiding, disposing, and jQuery interface.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes a new Toast instance with an element or selector and optional configuration.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the toast notification with various auto-hide and interaction behaviors.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Destroys the toast instance, removing event listeners and DOM references.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Returns the existing Toast instance associated with a given DOM element or null if none.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Returns the existing Toast instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery to create or call methods on toast elements.
